title: The World Gold Council, Women’s Empowerment and Gender Equality
gist: A World Gold Council statement announcing it has become a signatory of the UN Women's Empowerment Principles, with executive quotes and descriptions of its diversity commitments, the Responsible Gold Mining Principles, and partner organisations. It carries no gold prices, demand figures, or investable market signal.

insights.claim: The World Gold Council became a signatory of the UN Women's Empowerment Principles (WEPs), a seven-principle framework developed by the UN Global Compact and UN Women.
insights.speaker: World Gold Council
insights.so_what: ESG governance context for WGC and member miners; relevant to sustainability screens, not a price or demand signal.

insights.claim: WGC CEO David Tait signed the UN Women's Empowerment Principles on behalf of the organisation, framing it as reaffirming support for the UN Global Compact and the UN's Sustainable Development Goals.
insights.speaker: David Tait
insights.so_what: Leadership-level ESG commitment; useful only as governance/sustainability context.
insights.quote: I am very pleased to be signing the United Nations Women’s Empowerment Principles on behalf of the World Gold Council
insights.locator: David Tait, CEO, World Gold Council quote

insights.claim: WGC Chairman and Sibanye Stillwater CEO Neal Froneman frames the WEPs as helping the mining and metals industry address historical perceptions around its social impacts.
insights.speaker: Neal Froneman
insights.so_what: Industry-reputation framing from a senior miner executive; context for the sector's social-license narrative, not a trading signal.
insights.quote: The mining and metals industry has transformed and modernized significantly in recent years and is creating a lot of social value.

insights.claim: This is a corporate gender-equality/ESG statement and contains no gold prices, demand data, or investable market signal; gender-diversity workforce figures are referenced only as charts, not as text data.
insights.speaker: World Gold Council
insights.so_what: Flagged honestly: no actionable market content; included for completeness.
